hero.title: Professional furniture cleaning at your home
hero.description: Mubles Miguel cleans sofas, chairs, mattresses, and upholstery with a careful, practical process designed to refresh your home.
hero.imageAlt: Clean living room with a sofa after a furniture cleaning service

hero2.title: Clean upholstery without disrupting your day
hero2.description: We schedule a visit, review the material, and apply the right process for each piece.

aboutTeaser.title: We care for your furniture as part of your home
aboutTeaser.description: We are a close, responsible service focused on visible results, clear communication, and deep upholstery cleaning.
aboutTeaser.point2: Organized process to reduce moisture and residue
aboutTeaser.point3: Direct communication for quotes and scheduling
aboutTeaser.imageAlt: Living room with clean furniture and a minimal atmosphere

servicesBlock2.title: Furniture cleaning services
servicesBlock2.description: Deep cleaning for everyday pieces in homes, apartments, and workspaces.
servicesBlock2.intro: Each service adapts to the fabric type, usage level, and condition of the furniture to protect the surface and improve its appearance.

ctaStrip.title: Send a photo and get guidance for your service
ctaStrip.description: Tell us what furniture you need cleaned, your area, and your preferred schedule. We will respond with a clear recommendation.

deepUpholsteryWash.point3: Extraction to remove moisture and residue

stainRemoval.title: Stain treatment
stainRemoval.description: Focused care for visible stains, spills, and common marks on furniture.

fabricProtection.description: Preventive care to better preserve your furniture appearance.

homeVisit.title: At-home service

sofaCleaning.title: Sofa cleaning
sofaCleaning.description: Cleaning for daily-use sofas, sectionals, and family armchairs.

chairCleaning.title: Chair cleaning
chairCleaning.description: Ideal for dining chairs, upholstered chairs, and office furniture.

mattressCleaning.title: Mattress cleaning
mattressCleaning.description: Cleaning focused on freshness, hygiene, and reducing accumulated odors.

rugCleaning.title: Rug cleaning
rugCleaning.description: Care for rugs and carpets that receive constant foot traffic.

odorTreatment.title: Odor treatment
odorTreatment.description: Support process for furniture with odors from moisture, pets, or frequent use.
